description: GeoNames provides geographic and place-name data services, including search, reverse geocoding, postal code lookup, weather, elevation, and related location datasets. It also offers downloadable geographic data and webservice access over HTTP.
summary: GeoNames exposes a public HTTP REST web-services API at api.geonames.org; requests require a GeoNames account username passed as a query parameter. No GraphQL, MCP server, CLI, or machine-readable OpenAPI spec was found.
